# Civ Modding Central

> Civilization V modding workspace with guided planning, generators, references, art tools, packaging helpers, publishing support, and a growing Modded Civs Pedia.

Civ Modding Central provides guided planning, template generators, a pattern library, schema and Lua references, art helpers, packaging tools, community resources, the standalone CMC Workshop Uploader, and a Modded Civs Pedia for custom civ entries, collections, categories, and creators.

## Main pages

- Home: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/
- modded civs pedia: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia
- map viewer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/map-viewer
- guided planner: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/guided-planner
- template generators: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/template-generators
- pattern library: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/pattern-library
- schema browser: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/schema-browser
- lua api explorer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/lua-api-explorer
- religion support: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/religion-support
- tech tree viewer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/tech-tree-viewer
- civ icon maker: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/civ-icon-maker
- dds converter: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/dds-converter
- modinfo builder: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modinfo-builder
- civ5mod ziper: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/civ5mod-ziper
- workshop uploader: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/workshop-uploader
- community links: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/community-links

## Modded Civs Pedia

- Hub: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia
